title: digitalis denticulata
intro: Digitalis denticulata, also known as yellow foxglove or Denticulata foxglove, is a flowering plant species belonging to the foxglove family (Scrophulariaceae). This plant contains digitalis, a cardiac glycoside that has been used in medicine for centuries to treat various heart conditions, including atrial fibrillation, congestive heart failure, and other arrhythmias. The medicinal properties of Digitalis denticulata have been used to improve heart function and increase cardiac output, leading to several health benefits such as increased energy levels, improved circulation, and a reduced risk of heart failure. The plant can be prepared as a tincture, capsule, or tea, with the herbal preparations often used to treat heart-related conditions under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
